assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id":"openscap_018",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Length",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "The rule only modifies the pam_pwquality minlen setting, which is a standard password policy hardening step; it does not affect critical services or boot components.",
  "risk_factors": [],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Edit /etc/security/pwquality.conf or files in /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/ to set minlen=<desired length>",
    "Validate changes with a test password policy check",
    "Reload pam modules if required (no reboot needed)"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
assistant_message.reasoning:
